seoTitle: Tam O'Shanter vs Tambo — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tam O'Shanter and Tambo. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tam O'Shanter vs Tambo: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tam O'Shanter and Tambo.
heading: Tam O'Shanter vs Tambo — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tam O'Shanter, Queensland and Tambo, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tambo has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Tam O'Shanter (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tam O'Shanter or Tambo safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tam O'Shanter has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Tambo scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tam O'Shanter scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Tambo scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tam O'Shanter or Tambo?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tambo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
